title: In-Service Training Program for Economists from NARI (National Agricultural Research Institutions)in the Semi-Arid Tropics
abstract:
The In-Service Training Program (ISTP) 1985 was the second of its 
kind organized by ICRISAT's Economics and Training Programs. In 
these programs staff of Economics Program attempt to share their 
research experience with the trainees, familiarize trainees with 
research methods suitable for farming system research and make an 
effort to learn from the trainees about their research problems 
in the various parts of the semi-arid tropics from where the 
trainees come.
